title: Restore OpenCode agent fallback
description: Restore rakkib init OpenCode install offer, avoid reinstalling when already present, and default root-with-SUDO_USER bootstrap path to the sudo user's home.
close_reason: Restored OpenCode install offer, reuses existing OpenCode paths, and defaults root sudo-user bootstrap checkouts to the sudo user's home.

title: Simplify installer phases 1 2 4
description: Implement documentation collapse, step/lib trim, and shell consolidation from simplify.md, then update simplify.md with completion status.
close_reason: Implemented simplification phases 1, 2, and 4; updated simplify.md with status and verification notes.

title: Detect existing OpenCode outside PATH during init
close_reason: Fixed OpenCode detection for existing user-scoped installs

title: Make bootstrap prompt for rakkib init
description: Change install.sh so curl bootstrap only clones/updates the repo, installs the rakkib shim, and prints the rakkib init command instead of launching init automatically.
close_reason: install.sh now installs the CLI and prints rakkib init instead of launching init automatically.

title: Add sudo preauthorization keepalive
description: Improve Rakkib CLI UX by prompting for sudo before launching the agent and keeping the sudo timestamp alive while the agent session runs, without storing passwords.
close_reason: Added pre-agent sudo authorization and session-scoped sudo keepalive supervision.

title: Implement Rakkib CLI privilege split
description: Add a first-class rakkib CLI that runs orchestration as the normal user and isolates root-only actions behind explicit privileged subcommands, while preserving install.sh bootstrap compatibility.
close_reason: Implemented first-class rakkib CLI with user-first bootstrap handoff and allowlisted privileged helper actions.

title: Prompt before root bootstrap
description: Replace the root bootstrap hard error with a minimal confirmation prompt and align protocol wording.
close_reason: Replaced root bootstrap hard stop with minimal confirmation prompt.

title: Add transfer.sh optional service
description: Add dutchcoders/transfer.sh as an optional unauthenticated public file-transfer service in Rakkib, including checklist warning, Docker/Caddy templates, validation, docs, and landing page updates.
close_reason: Implemented transfer.sh optional service with no-auth warning, Docker/Caddy templates, docs, validation, and landing page updates.

title: Add Hermes optional service
description: Add NousResearch Hermes Agent as an optional Rakkib host service with a dashboard exposed at hermes.<domain> behind Authentik when selected.
close_reason: Implemented Hermes optional host service with Authentik-protected dashboard route, installer docs, templates, and web UI updates.

title: Integrate VErgo terminal host addon
description: Add terminal-only VErgo integration as a Rakkib host addon, excluding macOS WM/Desktop components.
close_reason: Implemented terminal-only VErgo host addon integration

title: Add rakkib uninstall command
description: The rakkib CLI command list should include uninstall. Implement a safe user-scoped uninstall that removes the ~/.local/bin/rakkib shim and the managed ~/.bashrc PATH block without deleting the repo or deployed services.
close_reason: Added safe rakkib uninstall command and verified help, syntax, and isolated HOME cleanup

title: Add bash PATH setup for rakkib shim
description: install.sh installs the rakkib shim into ~/.local/bin, but users may not have that directory on PATH. Add an idempotent ~/.bashrc update and clear next-step messaging so users can source ~/.bashrc and run rakkib.
close_reason: Implemented idempotent bash PATH setup in install.sh and verified shell syntax

title: revisit the root installation with sudo
add catogerizition to services in frontend
